nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Grosvenor was born in 1477, in Winnington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Randall Grosvenor I, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Mainwaring, was 17. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire. She died in 1558, in Winnington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Grosvenor est née en 1477, à Winnington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randall Grosvenor I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mainwaring, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire. Elle est décédée en 1558, à Winnington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Grosvenor 1477 in Winnington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Randall Grosvenor I 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Mainwaring 17. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1558 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Winnington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Grosvenor è nata il nel 1477 nel Winnington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Randall Grosvenor I, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Mainwaring, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire. Morì nel 1558, nel Winnington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.
